reasoning: Hans Niemann is ranked #15 (2738 rating) as of Oct 1, 2025, tied with another player. Given the short timeframe to Nov 2 (1 week), his ranking is very likely to stay at or above #15 (p=0.82). By Nov 25 (1 month), tournament participation and FIDE's new rating decay rules create moderate risk of ranking decline (p=0.68). By Jan 24, 2026 (3 months), increased tournament opportunities and rating volatility shown in history (lost 47.8 points in one tournament) make the outcome more uncertain (p=0.58). The new FIDE 400-point rule and rating decay policies specifically target 2650+ rated players like Niemann, adding downside risk over longer horizons.
